title: Sam Hall (rugby league)
extract:
Sam Hall (born (2002-05-08)8 May 2002) is an English professional rugby league footballer who plays as a prop or loose forward for the Castleford Tigers in the Super League.
He has previously spent time on loan and dual registration from Castleford at the Midlands Hurricanes in League 1, and at the London Broncos in the Championship.
